examples:
Command Example
#
!trustar-get-phishing-indicators from_time="7 days ago"
Context Example
#
{}
Human Readable Output
#

!trustar-get-phishing-indicators from_time="7 days ago"
Context Example
#
{}
Human Readable Output
#
No phishing indicators were found.
Edit this page

outputs.description: Indicator original score name TruSTAR.PhishingIndicator.originalIndicatorScore.value Indicator original score value
outputs.name: TruSTAR.PhishingIndicator.originalIndicatorScore.name

outputs.description: Indicator source key TruSTAR.PhishingIndicator.value Indicator value
outputs.name: TruSTAR.PhishingIndicator.sourceKey

outputs.description: The full file name (including file extension). File.MD5 The MD5 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.Name

outputs.description: The SHA1 hash of the file. File.SHA256 The SHA1 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.SHA1

outputs.description: The ID of the CVE, for example: CVE-2015-1653 Account.Email.Address The email address of the account.
outputs.name: CVE.ID

outputs.description: The path to the registry key Domain.Name The domain name, for example: "google.com".
outputs.name: RegistryKey.Path

outputs.description: The indicator we tested DBotScore.Type The type of the indicator
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
